chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3175 - وَ سَأَلَهُ زَيْدٌ اَلشَّحَّامُ فَقَالَ لَهُ : مَا لِمَنْ زَارَ وَاحِداً مِنْكُمْ قَالَ «كَمَنْ زَارَ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3175 - Zayd al-Shahham asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) "What is the reward for someone who visits one of you?"
Imam (as) replied: "It is as if they have visited the Messenger of Allah (swt), peace be upon him and his family."
